section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. 4 asset columns, all SP. Selections are black-filled cells. EIF marker row: IWM, VIG, OAYIX marked EIF; the GS Buffered PLUS note (SPVOA) is not. Transaction row is a black band spanning columns 2-4 (IWM, VIG, OAYIX) with no P/S/E letter (col 1 SPVOA blank) - treated as divider/redaction, transaction null for all. Value of Asset: G ($250,001-$500,000) filled across SPVOA, IWM, VIG (band spans cols 1-3); A:None filled for OAYIX (OAYIX column continues black one row below the transaction band). Type of Income: None->SPVOA; Dividends band spans IWM, VIG, OAYIX (cols 2-4); Capital Gains filled for IWM and OAYIX (gap at VIG). Amount of Income: A:None->SPVOA, G ($15,001-$50,000)->IWM, F ($5,001-$15,000)->VIG, D ($1,001-$2,500)->OAYIX.

rows.asset_name: GS Buffered PLUS Based on the Value of the EURO STOXX 50 Index due Oct 3,2019
Oakmark International Advisor (Oakmark International Investor Class (OAKIX) was exchanged for Advisor Class (OAYIX) on 5/4/2018)
